description: A travel analytics company wants to find 'travel buddies' — pairs of travelers who stayed at the same hotels. Using the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), create a new edge class 'TravelBuddy' (extending E) with an INTEGER property 'SharedHotels'. For all pairs of Profiles connected to at least one common Hotel via 'HasStayed' edges, create a 'TravelBuddy' edge between them and set the 'SharedHotels' property to the count of hotels they both stayed at. Compute each Profile's connectivity score (sum of 'SharedHotels' across all their TravelBuddy edges) and save a report to '/home/ga/travel_buddy_report.txt'. The report must follow this format: Line 1: 'Total TravelBuddy pairs: <N>'; Line 2: 'Top traveler: <Name> <Surname> (<Email>) with score <S>'; Remaining lines: All pairs listed as '<Name1> <Surname1> - <Name2> <Surname2>: <SharedHotels>', sorted by SharedHotels descending. Database credentials: root / GymAnything123! (or admin / admin for the demodb user).
